creator: mykel@mware.ca
text: Just compiled & tested against 10.3 and 11p1 and it works. Important to note that the local-address needs to be set in the neighbor config stanza, and not to use the "other" method w/IPSEC & setkey outside of bgpd.conf. (That method also has problem of SYNs not being signed, so you can't initiate a connection to an MD5 peer in passive mode.)
